title: kaempferia fallax
intro: Kaempferia fallax, also known as Black Ginger, is a type of plant native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the Zingiberaceae family. Traditionally, Kaempferia fallax has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of consuming Kaempferia fallax include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Kaempferia fallax is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, as well as in traditional Thai medicine, known as "Thai Black Ginger".
